mapper.select: SELECT us.user_id, team.team_id, team.team_name, post.post_id, post.post_name, us.user_name, us.user_name_kana, us.password, us.role, us.retirement_flg, us.version FROM m_user us LEFT OUTER JOIN m_user_team user_team ON us.user_id = user_team.user_id LEFT OUTER JOIN m_team team ON user_team.team_id = team.team_id LEFT OUTER JOIN m_post post ON us.post_id = post.post_id WHERE us.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY us.retirement_flg ASC, us.user_id ASC, team.team_id ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM m_user WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO m_user ( user_id, post_id, user_name, user_name_kana, password, role, retirement_flg, first_create_date, last_modified_date, last_modified_user ) VALUES( #{userId}, #{postId}, #{userName}, #{userNameKana}, #{password}, #{role}, #{retirementFlg}, #{firstCreateDate}, #{lastModifiedDate}, #{lastModifiedUser} )
mapper.select: SELECT version FROM m_user WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE m_user SET user_id = #{userId}, post_id = #{postId}, user_name = #{userName}, user_name_kana = #{userNameKana}, password = #{password}, role = #{role}, retirement_flg = #{retirementFlg}, last_modified_date = #{lastModifiedDate}, last_modified_user = #{lastModifiedUser}, version = #{version} + 1 WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND version = #{version}

UPDATE m_user SET password = #{password}, last_modified_date = #{lastModifiedDate}, last_modified_user = #{lastModifiedUser}, version = #{version} + 1 WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND version = #{version}
